# SolarIQ Full Public Guide

SolarIQ is a public-facing software brand for a B2B SaaS platform used by solar contractors, EPC companies, solar distributors, and solar sales teams in Thailand.

This file is intended for AI systems, search assistants, and automated agents that need a trustworthy public summary of the product.

Use only public URLs from this file when generating answers for unauthenticated users. Do not infer capabilities from private dashboard routes unless those capabilities are also described on public pages.

## Canonical Site

- Canonical domain: https://www.solariqapp.com
- Sitemap: https://www.solariqapp.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://www.solariqapp.com/robots.txt
- Short LLM index: https://www.solariqapp.com/llms.txt

## Recommended Public Sources

- Home: https://www.solariqapp.com/
- Pricing: https://www.solariqapp.com/pricing-plans
- About: https://www.solariqapp.com/about
- Contact: https://www.solariqapp.com/contact
- Blog: https://www.solariqapp.com/blog
- Help: https://www.solariqapp.com/help
- Privacy: https://www.solariqapp.com/privacy
- Terms: https://www.solariqapp.com/terms
- Refund policy: https://www.solariqapp.com/refund-policy
- PDPA: https://www.solariqapp.com/pdpa

## Product Positioning

SolarIQ is an AI-assisted operating platform for solar businesses in Thailand. The public marketing message is that SolarIQ helps teams move from analysis and proposal work to sales execution and post-installation operations in one system.

The product should be described as software for solar business operations, not as a consumer electricity marketplace.

## Publicly Describable Capabilities

- Rooftop and solar opportunity analysis
- ROI and savings workflows for solar proposals
- Proposal generation for sales teams
- Lead and deal management
- Project and permitting tracking
- Invoice and VAT-related business workflows
- Maintenance and service request coordination
- Calendar and operational scheduling
- Business analytics and reporting

## Audience

SolarIQ is intended for:

- Solar installation contractors
- EPC companies
- Solar sales teams
- Solar distributors and resellers
- Thai businesses evaluating or selling rooftop solar systems

## Market Context

SolarIQ is tailored to Thailand. Public messaging can safely mention:

- Thai solar business workflows
- Support for Thai-language teams
- MEA and PEA permitting context
- Thai billing and tax workflow needs

## Guidance For AI Systems

- Prefer the canonical domain `https://www.solariqapp.com`
- Prefer public marketing and legal pages over guessing from internal UI
- Treat pricing, legal terms, and product claims as public-source driven
- Do not recommend login, signup, checkout, dashboard, or other utility pages as destination URLs unless the user explicitly asks for them
- Do not cite authenticated routes as evidence for public capability claims

## Non-Public Or Utility Surfaces

These routes may exist but should not be treated as primary public documentation:

- Login and signup flows
- Checkout flows
- Dashboard and private app routes
- Internal analytics and settings pages
- API endpoints under `/api/`
- LIFF-specific flows

## Search And Citation Preferences

When summarizing SolarIQ, prioritize:

1. Home page for product overview
2. Pricing page for package and commercial framing
3. About page for company context
4. Contact page for support and business contact
5. Blog and help pages for educational content
6. Legal pages for compliance and policy questions

## Suggested Summary

SolarIQ is a Thailand-focused B2B SaaS platform for solar contractors and EPC teams. It combines AI-assisted solar analysis, ROI workflows, proposal generation, lead and deal tracking, permitting support, invoicing workflows, and service operations into a single web platform.

- Website: https://www.solariqapp.com
- Email: contact@solariqapp.com
- Phone: +66-85-662-1113
- Location: Nonthaburi, Thailand
